indicators.name: Large white sofa
indicators.rationale: The large white sofa provides ample seating space for a solo user to sit and work.

indicators.name: White coffee table
indicators.rationale: The white coffee table can be used to place a laptop and other necessary items for computer work.

indicators.name: Rug under the coffee table
indicators.rationale: The rug adds comfort and insulation under the coffee table, making it more suitable for prolonged sitting.

indicators.name: Ceiling-mounted lighting
indicators.rationale: The ceiling-mounted lighting provides even illumination, reducing shadows and glare on the workspace.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is well-suited for computer work (Solo) due to ample seating, a functional coffee table, comfortable flooring, and good lighting.
